description: Behavior and pattern blocklist for agent skills.

entries.description: Skill references public webhook or request collection infrastructure.

metadata.rationale: Skills should not send endpoint or repository data to unapproved external sinks.

entries.description: Skill is installed from a transient Downloads path.

metadata.rationale: Transient install locations make provenance and update review weak.

entries.description: Skill is installed from a temporary path.

metadata.rationale: Temporary directories are inappropriate for trusted executable skills.
